en: Usual? Oh, you know, I don't want to try something new.
ko: 아, 있잖아, 새로운 걸 시도하고 싶지 않아.

en: We're feeling adventurous, aren't we? I mean, maybe.
I can take it back. No. Thank you.
ko: 그러니까, 어쩌면. 취소할 수도 있어. 안 돼.

en: You've been there on your birthday And you're calling me up a lot
So baby, who's your boyfriend now?
